creator: mail@bastimeyer.de
text:
The min version of py-trio should be 0.22.0, not 0.9.0.
And the min version of py-urllib3 should be 1.26.0, not 1.21.1.

See here
https://github.com/streamlink/streamlink/blob/6.1.0/pyproject.toml#L50-L64

Other than that, the patch should be fine.

Please also don't forget to bump from 6.1.0 to 6.2.0.

Thanks!
